title: Chainmailed
description: Allows chainmail armor to be overlayed on top of other armor, adding its armor points to the other
body:
Chainmailed allows you to overlay chainmail armor on top of any other armor in order to add its armor points to the other

### **How to use**

Put any armor, the corresponding chainmail piece, and one iron ingot into a smithing table. Equip the armor to add the armor bonus

![Chainmail armor bonus smithing recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5fda1028487254b60345c39504d15e4d757280b4.png)

![The armor bonus and upgrade description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9f9912728c7872173189286869989729a5b4b5f7.png)

![Diamond + Chainmail on the player](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/47dfd7d56c2386b4ef5a7d12671cfd6f1f7b5bee.png)

This datapack/mod uses armor trims for the visuals as well as the effect. If the armor trim is removed/overwritten, the bonus armor will be removed as well

If using the datapack version, the resource pack is also required to prevent missing textures
